meta.title: scene clip demo — the Lua layout engine
meta.notes: Self-demo for docs/LAYOUT_ENGINE.md: two `scene` clips (a reflowable quote card and a count-up stat), each a Lua script over the forkable presets/lua/std.lua stdlib. Transparent, sits on the checker. Render: build/slopstudio.exe examples/scene-demo.slop.json --shot out.png --time 1.5

params.script:
local t, d = ...
return widgets.quote(t, { text = d.text, cite = d.cite })

data.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
data.cite: a reflowable, transparent, native quote card

params.script:
local t, d = ...
return widgets.stat(t, { to = d.to, label = d.label, dur = 1.4 })
